name: Yankee Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef in a hot skillet on both sides.
2. Turn the burner down and add water, bay leaves, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Cover and simmer slowly for 3 - 4 hours or until the beef is fork tender.
4. Peel and cut the vegetables (carrots and potatoes) into appropriate sizes.
5. Add the vegetables to the pan, cover, and simmer another 30 minutes or until the carrots are tender.
6. Thicken the pan juices for gravy.
